hero.title: Ukucela iprojekthi yokufikeleleka
hero.lead: I-IATF ihlola izicelo zeeprojekthi zokufikeleleka eziqala kwimfuno yokwenene.
support: Akuyomfuneko ukuba uchaze zonke iinkcukacha, kodwa into efunekayo kukuchaza ingxaki ngokucacileyo, ukuba ichaphazela bani, nesizathu sokuba ibaluleke.

items.label: IWebhusayithi
items.body: Sebenzisa le fomu ingezantsi ukuze uthumele isicelo esicwangcisiweyo.

items.label: I-imeyile
items.body: Thumela isicelo ngqo kwi- {{contact.requestsEmail}}Izicelo ze-imeyile zinokuba ziirekhodi zesicelo esidlangalaleni emva kokuphononongwa nokucinywa.

items.label: Ukungavisisani
items.body: Qalisa apho ukuba oko kulula. Isicelo sisaqhubeka kuhlalutyo olunye.

guidance.title: Phambi kokuba uthumele isicelo
paragraphs: I-IATF isebenza esidlangalaleni. Izicelo zinokushwankathelwa kwaye zipapashwe njengerekhodi yezicelo zoluntu kwi-GitHub, kule webhusayithi, okanye kuzo zombini.

Musa ukufaka iidilesi zabucala, iinombolo zefowuni, iinkcukacha zonyango, okanye iinkcukacha zokuchonga umsebenzisi ngamnye wezobugcisa obuncedisayo ngaphandle kokuba kuyimfuneko kwaye awukhathazeki ukuba i-IATF ihlaziye.
I-IATF isusa iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano ezingeyomfuneko phambi kokupapasha iirekhodi zesicelo.

review.title: Uhlalutyo lwezinto ezilindelweyo
paragraphs: Ukungeniswa kwesicelo akuqinisekisi ukuba siya kwamkelwa.
I-IATF ihlolisisa izicelo zokufaneleka komsebenzi, ukusebenziseka, ukuba luncedo, nokuba umsebenzi ufanelekile na kwindawo yolondolozo yoluntu.
Ezinye izicelo zisenokwaliwa, zihlehliswe okanye zilungiswe ngaphambi kokuba zamkelwe.

fields.name: Iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano
fields.label: Iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano
fields.helper: Idilesi ye-imeyile okanye idilesi yeDiscord yokulandelela.

fields.name: extraUmongo
fields.label: Umxholo owongezelelweyo
fields.helper: Yabelana ngayo nayiphi na enye into enokunceda ukucacisa imfuneko: isizathu sokuba ibalulekile, imizekelo, iimbekiselo, ingcamango yesoftware ekrwada, okanye imiqathango yexesha.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Ngaba ukhululekile ekuphuhlisweni komthombo ovulekileyo?
fields.helper: Iiprojekthi ezamkelweyo zizigcini zoluntu phantsi kwe-IATF.

items: Indawo yokugcina yoluntu kumbutho we-IATF GitHub
ilayisensi ye-copyleft yekhowudi kunye nezinto zeprojekthi

paragraphs: Ukuba unemfuno yokwenyani yokufikeleleka kwaye ucinga ukuba kufanele ukuba ibe yiprojekthi yoluntu, thumela kuthi.
